text.title: Serverless Cost Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (billing, metrics, downstream cost, PC data)?

text.example: Inventory shows checkout-fn = $1.8k/mo (60%). r1: memory tuned 1024→512MB → saves $720/mo. r2: PC 10→auto-scale min 2 → saves $400/mo. r3: BatchGetItem 25× → saves $250/mo. r5: break-even 350 RPS (currently 80 RPS) — stay on Lambda. After: $2.0k → $0.85k/mo. Spec ready.
